summary: Iteration 128: Comprehensive testing of notification system improvements, events, and boycotts. All major features verified working: CineWorld News badge on event notifications, effect_minutes with colored text (green for bonus, red for malus), event_desc in italic, boycott_type display, investigate-boycott endpoint, and notification click navigation to film popup.
critical_code_review_comments: notification_engine.py correctly implements 'source' field with 'CineWorld News' for event notifications
scheduler_tasks.py DYNAMIC_EVENTS use new format with title, desc, mod dict and effect_minutes calculation
NotificationsPage.jsx correctly renders CineWorld News badge, event_desc in italic, effect_minutes with colors
ComingSoonSection.jsx NewsEvent component shows narrative title/desc/minutes format
server.py investigate-boycott endpoint at line ~10431 correctly handles ownership check and returns proper responses
Boycott interactions store boycott_type and boycott_name fields in coming_soon_interactions collection

success_rate.backend: 100% (10/10 passed, 3 skipped - test film not in coming_soon status)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data. 4 test notifications already in DB for test user.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notification system improvements fully implemented. Key verified features: 1) CineWorld News badge on event-type notifications, 2) effect_minutes displayed with colored text (red for +minutes/malus, green for -minutes/bonus), 3) event_desc shown in italic below message, 4) boycott_type shown with AlertTriangle icon, 5) Notification click navigates to /create-film?film=<project_id> and opens film popup, 6) investigate-boycott endpoint returns 'Nessun boicottaggio da investigare' when no boycotts exist. Test film 7a50f140-5f11-408c-aa95-78de752b6d57 (Fuoco e Cenere) is in 'proposed' status, not 'coming_soon', so Indaga Sabotaggio button not visible.

backend_dynamic_events.format: title, desc, mod dict with effect_minutes calculation

frontend_notifications_page.boycott_type_display: Shown with AlertTriangle icon in red
frontend_notifications_page.filter_tabs: Tutte, Critiche, Importanti, Positive all working
